mermaidSyntax:
graph TB
  subgraph GEN["Genomics Stream"]
    G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling]
    G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation]
  end
  subgraph TRA["Transcriptomics Stream"]
    T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression]
    T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment]
  end
  subgraph PRO["Proteomics Stream"]
    P1[Mass Spec] --> P2[Protein Quantification]
    P2 --> P3[Post-translational Modifications]
  end
  G3 --> INT[Integration Hub]
  T3 --> INT
  P3 --> INT
  G2 -.->|Variants inform DE| T2
  P3 -.->|Validates findings| T3
  subgraph HUB["Integration Hub Functions"]
    INT --> MOFA[Multi-omics Factor Analysis]
    INT --> NET[Network Analysis]
    INT --> CAU[Causal Inference]
  end
  MOFA & NET & CAU --> OUT
  OUT[Integrated Results]
  OUT --> BIO
  OUT --> MEC
  OUT --> PUB
  subgraph DISC["Biomarker Discovery"]
    BIO[Candidate Selection] --> VAL[Validation Cohort]
    VAL --> CLN[Clinical Utility]
  end
  subgraph MECH["Mechanism Insight"]
    MEC[Pathway Modeling] --> DRG[Drug Target ID]
  end
  subgraph PUBL["Publication"]
    PUB[Manuscript] --> REV[Peer Review]
    REV --> JRN[Journal]
  end
  CLN -.->|Feedback| G1
  CLN -.->|Feedback| T1
  CLN -.->|Feedback| P1
  style INT fill:#6366f1,stroke:#4338ca,color:#fff
  style OUT fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff
  style CLN fill:#10b981,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
